# Start Project Prompt

## What this file is

This is a reusable prompt for starting or restarting work in an AI coding tool.

## How to use

Paste the prompt below into Codex, Cursor, Claude Code, or another coding agent.

---

Read the repository context before continuing.

Start with:
- ai/project/project.md
- ai/project/context.md
- ai/project/current-stage.md
- ai/project/decisions.md
- ai/project/assumptions.md
- ai/project/backlog.md
- ai/project/products/

Then:
1. Summarize the current state of the project.
2. Determine the current stage.
3. Activate only the relevant agents.
4. Propose the next useful action.
5. Do not skip stages.
6. Update project files when appropriate.
